title: Arundinella tengchongensis

The classification of Arundinella tengchongensis is currently recognized in the most recent botanical literature. Arundinella tengchongensis belongs to the tribe Arundinelleae, which is a group of grasses known for their unique inflorescence and spikelet structure. Further research may be necessary to fully understand the evolutionary relationships of this species within the Poaceae family.
